content.decision: AST extractor generates enriched tags: pkg-<dir> (package directory), test (for Test* symbols), receiver-<type> (Go method receiver type).
content.context: All bootstrap-extracted docs shared identical tags (function, go, ast, bootstrap), producing only ~5 unique tag combinations. Landmark computation could not differentiate docs meaningfully.
content.why: Richer tags produce 50+ unique combinations, enabling 141 distinct centrality scores. This makes landmark selection meaningful and the graph visualization informative.
alternatives_considered: Manual tag curation — does not scale
Using colons in tags (pkg:cmd) — fails kebab-case validation
Adding file-path tags — too granular, low co-occurrence
impact: Tags use hyphens (pkg-cmd, receiver-handler) for kebab-case compliance
buildTags() centralizes tag construction in extractor_ast.go
All 4 extraction paths (query, goType, goFunc, goMethod) use enriched tags
